nasb.text: “As for the head of those who surround me, May the mischief of their lips cover them.

esv.text: As for the head of those who surround me, let the mischief of their lips overwhelm them!

cnv.text: 至於那些圍困我的人， 願他們的頭被自己嘴唇的奸惡遮蓋。

ccb.text: 愿那些围攻我的人自食恶果。

csbs.text: 至于那些围困我的人， 愿他们嘴唇的祸患遮盖自己的头；
